title: Create a Bill on Water Conservation
description: Draft and debate a legislative bill addressing water conservation in urban and rural areas. Consider economic impact, implementation challenges, and environmental benefits. Each group member will take on a different stakeholder perspective to create a comprehensive discussion.

title: AI in Education: Boon or Bane?
description: Discuss the impact of artificial intelligence on modern education systems. Should AI tools be embraced in classrooms or regulated? Consider effects on learning outcomes, teacher roles, equity, and student development.

title: Should India Implement Universal Basic Income?
description: Debate the feasibility and impact of implementing Universal Basic Income in India. Analyze economic sustainability, social impact, inflation risks, and compare with existing welfare programs.

title: Space Exploration vs. Solving Earth's Problems
description: Should governments prioritize space exploration or focus resources on solving pressing issues on Earth like poverty, climate change, and healthcare? Discuss the trade-offs, long-term benefits, and ethical considerations.

title: Should Social Media Be Regulated by Government?
description: Debate whether governments should regulate social media platforms. Consider free speech, misinformation, mental health impacts, data privacy, and the role of tech companies in self-governance.

title: CETA 2030: The Green Trade-Off
description: A multi-stakeholder negotiation over the U.S. Lithium Battery tariff rate. Four experts — a Labor Union Representative, Consumer Advocate, State Department Diplomat, and Lead Climate Scientist — must negotiate a tariff level that balances domestic job security, household affordability, international trade relations, and the 2035 Net Zero climate target. Each expert holds unique data and a hidden insight that can unlock compromise.
